# Quereia Sandstone

**Summary**: A Cambrian-Ordovician sedimentary unit.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] investigated the Quweira Sandstone to identify its sedimentological characteristics.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] Fluvial-tidal mixed system

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Quweira Sandstone contains significant amounts of deformed sandstones (Facies 11, 12). ([[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014, p. 150]])
